channel.title: Catalyst Edge — Build log
channel.description: Public build log for Catalyst Edge Scanner. Methodology deep-dives, postmortems, what 30 days of solo building looks like.

item.title: Why we publish our hit rate (and Bloomberg never will)
item.description: Bloomberg, FactSet, and Refinitiv won't publish their hit rates. We do — and here's why, plus how to read ours without confusing accuracy for skill.

item.title: How the cross-border convergence score works
item.description: The 4-point composite signal we use to score ADR ↔ home-listing setups in real time. Math, worked example, and the edge cases we deliberately threw out.

item.title: 30 days to build a Bloomberg killer
item.description: Phase by phase. The week that everything broke. The first $9 customer. The misses I won't repeat.
